conflictBlocks.oursContent:
* - energyByUserId: Map<user_id, 0..1> for heat coloring occupied seats
 * - userSeatId: optional seat id to highlight
 * - variant: "card" (default) | "fullscreen" (fills the parent)

padding: "12px 14px",

            color: "#AAB1C3",
            fontSize: 12,

Arena • {cap.toLocaleString()} capacity •{" "} {stats.occupiedCount.toLocaleString()} in seats
Home

preservedBehaviors.description: SeatingMap component exports a named function
SeatingMap accepts homeColor and awayColor props
SeatingMap renders SVG with sections and tiers
SeatingMap renders a court area inside the bowl
SeatingMap uses energyByUserId for heat coloring
SeatingMap sections are rendered using arcWedgePath
SeatingMap accepts a variant prop with card and fullscreen modes
SeatingMap hides title/legend in fullscreen mode
SeatingMap adjusts outerWrapStyle and cardStyle based on variant
SeatingMap adjusts SVG height based on variant (100% for fullscreen)
arena-preview page uses SeatingMap with variant=fullscreen
game page uses SeatingMap with variant=fullscreen
SeatingMap sections use 3 tiers with 18 sections per tier
SeatingMap header shows capacity and occupied count
SeatingMap renders Home and Away legends with colored dots
